title: eryngium ovinum
intro: Eryngium ovinum, also known as Raisin or Sea Holly, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the carrot family Apiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and saponins. The health benefits of Eryngium ovinum include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and even act as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and respiratory problems.
